text: In this modern, thoughtfully designed space, sharp lines and reflective glass create an air of anticipation and clarity. Walking past the empty meeting room, I sense both potential collaboration and the poignancy of vacancy. Moving into the R+D area, I’m surrounded by vibrant colors and digital displays, prompting me to contemplate humanity’s evolving relationship with technology. I feel curious, quietly inspired, but also slightly detached—as if I’m both participant and observer in an ongoing experiment.
